commands.command: re-review — added real-behavior proof to the pr body: an end-to-end harness against the real lock stack (real `acquiresessionwritelock` + `@openclaw/fs-safe` manager + on-disk `.jsonl.lock`) that injects the transient `eio` fence-read failure and shows the next interactive acquire wedges with `sessionwritelocktimeouterror` on current `main` (failed after 2002ms) but succeeds in 1ms with the fix (lock released instead of orphaned)
